query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, c.title as courseTitle, c.code as courseCode, c.description as courseDescription 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
ORDER BY l.id 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, c.title as courseTitle, c.code as courseCode, c.description as courseDescription 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
ORDER BY l.id 
LIMIT 10;

rows.title: Introduction to the New Testament Canon and Historical Context
rows.courseDescription: This rigorous course examines the New Testament canon through historical-critical and theological lenses. Students will explore the life and teachings of Jesus Christ, the formation and expansion of the early church, Pauline theology, the General Epistles, and the apocalyptic vision of Revelation. Special attention is given to how the New Testament fulfills Old Testament promises, establishes foundational Christian doctrine, and provides a framework for understanding salvation history. The course equips students to interpret New Testament texts responsibly and apply their teachings to modern ministry contexts.
